collected_supplier_names: 潮州市潮安区彩塘镇广成不锈钢制品厂
summary: Hermes completed the phased operator-assisted direct 1688 workflow, producing canonical candidate-set, evidence-notes, and Markdown report artifacts for 2 credible suppliers.
blockers: the bounded direct search harvest surfaced only 2 reviewable candidates, so the final shortlist remained below the 3-supplier target
limitations: the run depended on an operator-provided authenticated Chrome session rather than an automated login flow
the phase-1 raw transcript required manual normalization into a schema-valid candidate-set artifact
the phase-3 raw transcript included duplicated report content and a trailing session id, so the canonical Markdown report was normalized before persistence
